Hackathon 2026

Sentinel

Advanced cryptographic coprocessor for the physical world. Rust-powered batch verification on PolkaVM.

Track

Polkadot Solidity

Status

Registration Open

About
Challenges
Schedule
Prizes
Sponsors
Register
About Outreach

The Mission

Sentinel is the first cryptographic coprocessor designed specifically for DePIN networks on Polkadot. We bridge the gap between high-performance Rust cryptography and Solidity smart contracts.

Problem

EVM lacks native support for ed25519 signatures, making IoT device verification prohibitively expensive and slow.

Solution

A Rust-powered PVM engine that achieves 95x better efficiency than EVM for batch verification.

Hackathon Tracks

Themes

DePIN Privacy

Implement privacy-preserving telemetry using ed25519 and zero-knowledge proofs on PolkaVM.

IoT Security

Build secure firmware attestation bridges between physical devices and Polkadot Hub.

Efficiency Max

Optimize cryptographic primitives in Rust for maximum performance on PVM.

Total Prize Pool

$50,000
